product_overview: BiTE is a RESTful backend (Go + Fiber + PostgreSQL) that powers bitcoin-themed timed quizzes, user registration/auth, satoshi rewards, and category certificates (PDF/PNG). The API surface, authentication scheme, and endpoint inventory are documented in the provided PRD (see authentication scheme on pages 2-3 and full endpoint inventory on pages 59-60).
core_goals: Provide secure user authentication and session management (access + refresh JWT tokens).
Allow admins to create and manage quizzes, questions, and answers while enabling authenticated students to attempt quizzes and track progress.
Enable rewards and certificates: manage sats rewards (Lightning integration) and generate/store certificates (chromedp → S3).
Offer analytics, ranking, and site-visit telemetry for admin and user insights.
Support file attachments (images, PDF/PNG for certificates) with S3-backed storage and ensure testability via mocks for external services.

features.name: Auth API
features.description: User registration, sign-in, refresh token exchange, password reset flows, and session tokens. Authentication scheme (access + refresh JWT) and admin role enforcement are described in the PRD (see pages 2-3 and auth endpoints on pages 7-11).
user_flows: POST /api/v1/user/auth/signin with valid email+password -> Receive 200 with accessToken, refreshToken and user profile (status="success")
POST /api/v1/user/auth/signin with invalid password -> Receive 400 with error message "Invalid email/password!"
POST /api/auth/login with valid credentials -> Receive 200 with JWT token (codebase endpoint from code_summary)
POST /api/v1/user/auth/rt-signin with valid refreshToken -> Receive 200 with new accessToken and refreshToken
POST /api/v1/user/auth/rt-signin with expired/invalid refreshToken -> Receive 400 and error message (refresh token missing/expired/invalid)
POST /api/v1/user/auth/signup with valid payload (name,email,password,agreedTermsOfService=true) -> Receive 201 with accessToken, refreshToken and user object
POST /api/v1/user/auth/signup with agreedTermsOfService=false -> Receive 400 with message about agreeing to terms

features.name: Quiz Management (read & admin write)
features.description: Admin endpoints to create/update/duplicate/hide/show quizzes; authenticated users can list and fetch quizzes and attempt-mode quiz data. Full quiz API documented across pages 19-28 (and endpoint inventory on pages 59-60).
user_flows: POST /api/v1/quiz/ with valid admin Bearer token and required fields (postedByUserID, quizCategoryID, title, startsAt in future, endsAt > startsAt) -> Receive 201 with created Quiz object
POST /api/v1/quiz/ with endsAt <= startsAt -> Receive 400 with date range validation error
GET /api/v1/quiz/ with valid Bearer token -> Receive 200 with array of quizzes (status="success")
GET /api/quizzes with valid Bearer token -> Receive 200 with quiz list (codebase endpoint from code_summary)
GET /api/v1/quiz/attempt/:id with Bearer token for attemptable quiz -> Receive 200 with quiz questions and answers but without isCorrect fields (sanitized for student)
GET /api/v1/quiz/attempt/:id for quiz that is not attemptable -> Receive 400 "Quiz not attemptable"

features.name: Questions & Answers (admin write / user read)
features.description: Admins create and manage questions and answers (sequence ordering, multiple-correct, numerical answers); students read questions/answers through quiz endpoints. See pages 29-36 for question/answer endpoints and constraints.
user_flows: POST /api/v1/question/ with admin Bearer token and valid payload (postedByUserID, quizID, title, sequenceNumber) -> Receive 201 with created Question object
POST /api/v1/question/ with duplicate sequenceNumber for same quiz -> Receive 400 duplicate sequenceNumber error
POST /api/v1/answer/ with admin Bearer token and valid payload (postedByUserID, questionID, title, sequenceNumber) -> Receive 201 with created Answer object
POST /api/v1/answer/ with missing required fields -> Receive 400 missing fields error
GET /api/v1/question/:id with Bearer token -> Receive 200 with question plus answers and attachments
GET /api/v1/answer/question/:questionID with Bearer token -> Receive 200 with ordered answers array

features.name: Attempts & Attempt Duration
features.description: Students submit answers (one Attempt row per selected answerID) and the system emits async events to update AttemptStatus and QuizUserProgress. AttemptDuration upsert and retrieval also supported. See attempts specification on page 37 and attemptduration on pages 38-39.
user_flows: POST /api/v1/attempt/ with Bearer token and valid payload (userID, questionID, answerIDList JSON string with at least one answer UUID) -> Receive 200 with message "Attempt created successfully!" and data array of created Attempt objects
POST /api/v1/attempt/ with empty answerIDList -> Receive 400 with message "Please provide an answer!"
POST /api/v1/attempt/ selecting an answer already attempted by this user for this question -> Receive 400 "You have already attempted this question!"
PATCH /api/v1/attemptduration/quiz/:quizID with Bearer token and valid payload (quizID path, userID, duration integer) -> Receive 200 with updated AttemptDuration object
GET /api/v1/attemptduration/quiz/:quizID with Bearer token and userID query -> Receive 200 with AttemptDuration record or null

features.name: Sats Rewards (Lightning) & Addresses
features.description: Claim sats rewards for completed quizzes, manage and verify Lightning addresses, and admin listing. Integrates with Blink (recommend stubbing in tests). See pages 39-43 for endpoints and business rules.
user_flows: POST /api/v1/satsreward/claim-quiz with Bearer token and valid payload (userID, quizID) when user has completed quiz and has verified default Lightning address -> Receive 201 with created SatsReward record (status="success")
POST /api/v1/satsreward/claim-quiz when user hasn't completed quiz -> Receive 400 "Quiz not completed by user"
POST /api/v1/satsreward/address with Bearer token and payload (userID, address) -> Receive 201 with created SatsRewardAddress
POST /api/v1/satsreward/address with duplicate address -> Receive 400 duplicate address error
PATCH /api/v1/satsreward/address/:id/default with Bearer token -> Receive 200 with updated address (previous default cleared)

features.name: Category Certificates
features.description: Define category certificates (which quizzes required), claim certificates once prerequisites complete, generate PDF+PNG via chromedp and upload to S3. Claim flow and constraints documented on pages 44-47.
user_flows: POST /api/v1/certificate/ with admin Bearer token and valid payload (quizCategoryID, quizIDs array) -> Receive 201 with created CategoryCertificate

POST /api/v1/certificate/claim with Bearer token and payload (userID, categoryCertificateID) when user has completed all required quizzes -> Receive 201 with CertificateAwarded containing PDF and PNG S3 URLs
POST /api/v1/certificate/claim when user has not completed prerequisites -> Receive 400 "User has not completed all required quizzes"
GET /api/v1/certificate/:id/claim-status/user/:userID with Bearer token -> Receive 200 with data {claimed: boolean, certificateAwarded: object|null}

features.name: File Uploads & Attachments
features.description: Support multipart uploads for quiz/question/answer/category images and certificate artifacts. File limits and test matrix (10 MB limit, edge cases) are specified on pages 12, 15, 19 and 57.
user_flows: POST /api/v1/quiz/ with admin Bearer token and multipart/form-data including a valid image (< 10 MB) -> Receive 201 with created Quiz and attachment.url populated
POST /api/v1/quiz/ with file exactly 10 MB -> Receive 201 accepted (edge-case per spec)
POST /api/v1/quiz/ with file > 10 MB -> Receive 400 "File size exceeds the 10 MB limit"
PATCH /api/v1/quizcategory/:id/attachment/:attachmentID with admin Bearer token and new file -> Receive 200 with updated attachment object

features.name: Analytics, Ranking & Site Visits
features.description: Admin dashboards and per-user analytics, plus site-visit telemetry. Admin analytics and ranking endpoints and sitevisit contract are on pages 48-51 and 50 respectively.
user_flows: GET /api/v1/analytics/admin with admin Bearer token -> Receive 200 with admin analytics summary (status="success")
GET /api/v1/analytics/user with Bearer token and userID query -> Receive 200 with user analytics object
POST /api/v1/sitevisit/ (no auth) with payload (page, path, capturedAt) -> Receive 201 with created SiteVisit (used for anonymous tracking)
GET /api/v1/ranking/users with admin Bearer token -> Receive 200 with list of users and computed rank metrics

features.name: AI Previews (Gemini)
features.description: Generate and manage machine-generated answer previews using Google Gemini. Admin generation and default selection are documented on pages 52-54; Gemini integration should be mocked for tests.
user_flows: POST /api/v1/aipreview/ with admin Bearer token and payload (questionID, prompt, summary) -> Receive 201 with created AIPreview (status="success")
GET /api/v1/aipreview/question/:questionID with Bearer token (non-admin) -> Receive 200 with only the default preview for the question
PATCH /api/v1/aipreview/:id/default with admin Bearer token -> Receive 200 with updated AIPreview and previous default cleared (business-rule)
